items.caption: A slide from a presentation, numbered 29, with a green and blue color scheme. it contains text that explains the purpose and function of directional relays in high voltage transmission lines. the text is organized into bullet points and provides information on how directional relays are used to protect the lines, the measurements taken to determine the direction of current flow, and the methods of communication between relays at both ends of the line. it also mentions the use of line carrier and microwave communication.
